titleStmt.title: The American Delegation to the Acting Secretary of State

head.hi: The American Delegation to the Acting Secretary of State

div.p:
236. For the Acting Secretary only from Secretary Stettinius. Will you be good enough to have the map roomCommunications and files center at the White House. send the following message to the PresidentThe President was at sea returning from the Yalta Conference. as from me:
“In plenary session this afternoon, there were several commendatory references to the United States. Padilla said the United States should be given homage of gratitude as it had borne the greatest burden of the war. The Uruguayan Foreign MinisterPresumably the former Foreign Minister, Jacobo Varela. paid a tribute to you which was soundly applauded. My reference to you in the opening of my talk and also a statement I made as to how greatly the success of the Crimea ConferenceFor documentation on the Yalta Conference, see Foreign Relations, The Conferences at Malta and Yalta, 1945. was due to you were enthusiastically received. You received a great tribute. The Conference is off to a good start.”
